_publications._publicationTitle: Bioluminescent imaging of intracranial vestibular schwannoma xenografts in NOD/SCID mice.

_contextSnippet: All of these mice were generated from 4 (67%) of the 6 patient excised tumors. Patient Tumors 1 to 4 resulted in engraftment rates in the mice of 100% (1 of 1), 80% (4 of 5), 67% (2 of 3), and 20% (1 of 5)
details: 4 of 6 patient tumors (67%) resulted in successful mouse engraftment, with individual engraftment rates of 100% (1/1), 80% (4/5), 67% (2/3), and 20% (1/5) for tumors 1-4, while tumors 5-6 showed 0% engraftment
